verdict: COSRX's snail mucin formula delivers exceptional hydration and skin-barrier repair with highest customer rating (4.4★) and massive validation (9200 reviews). This K-beauty leader sets gold standard for essence-serums with proven regenerative ingredients.

_research.name: Advanced Snail Repair Essence
pros: Snail secretion proven for barrier repair
_research.con: Snail secretion may concern ethical/vegan consumers; protein content unsuitable for certain allergies.
